item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.98,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"三个季度里，获客成本差距收窄、留存曲线靠近、毛利差距变小；现在要判断两条销售路径是否合并，请给建议。"}],"abstain_reason":""}
